lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: All this mining is tiring work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you're not even mining at the moment.

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: Hey! I've been mining all day thank you very much! I'm allowed a break ain't I?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I suppose.

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: I should think so. Anyway did you need anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are these rocks?

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: Rocks? They're not rocks, they're minerals!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay. What are they though?

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: Amethyst! We use it a lot back in Keldagrim but this is the only place we've managed to find it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I use it for?

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: We've found it's quite good for ranging ammunition, something you adventuring lot might like.

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: We use it a lot for Construction back in Keldagrim as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Awesome! Does that mean I can use it in my house?

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: Because I said so that's why! Even the best human builders wouldn't know how to build with this stuff.

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: And you're a long way off the best, believe me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Awww.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Utrec
lines.text: Well be on your way then. I've got mining to do!
